meta.title: Pickles | Ambassadors
meta.description: Our vinegaroon was born in captivity and ethically sourced. Sadly, Pickles passed away in February 2023 because she was unable to make it through her first molt.

data.name: Pickles
data.story:
Our vinegaroon was born in captivity and ethically sourced.

Sadly, Pickles passed away in February 2023 because she was unable to make it through her first molt.
data.mission: She is an ambassador for the importance of invertebrates and the misconceptions they face.
